channel.title: Generative on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Generative on Arrans github.io

item.title: h2oai/h2o-llmstudio
item.description: H2O LLM Studio - a framework and no-code GUI for fine-tuning LLMs. Documentation: https://docs.h2o.ai/h2o-llmstudio/

item.title: esimov/triangle
item.description: Convert images to computer generated art using delaunay triangulation.
